turns.content: I have been living in Chicago for the past four years. Love the city but the winters are brutal.
Chicago winters are legendary! Are you planning to stay long-term?
Not sure. I keep thinking about moving somewhere warmer.
What cities are you considering?
Big news — I accepted a job offer in Austin and I am moving there next month. Leaving Chicago behind!
Austin is a great city! Tech scene, great food, and much warmer winters.
Exactly why I chose it. I am really excited about the change.
What is the new role?
Settled in Austin now. I started at Apex Technologies — a Series B startup doing supply chain software.
Series B is an exciting stage. What will you be working on?
Leading the platform engineering team. Lots of interesting challenges ahead.
That sounds like a great opportunity.
I left Apex after eight months — the culture was not a good fit. I just joined BigCorp as a principal engineer.
Making a change is brave. What drew you to BigCorp?
Stability, compensation, and a genuinely interesting infrastructure problem to solve.
That sounds like a well-considered move.
Just bought a Honda Civic — first car I have owned in years. Austin really requires one.
The Civic is a reliable choice. Manual or automatic?
Automatic. I am a city driver, no need to make things harder.
Practical thinking. Enjoy the new wheels!
